titleStmt.title: SII 5.664: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 664. (A.R. No. 103 of 1895). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyu n=ta ṉakke Uri
maiy pūṇṭamaiy mana(ṉa)kkoḷak kān=ta ḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi
veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭa
malaināṭum kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa(m)
maṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal venṟi
ttaṇṭāl koṇṭa tanṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷ Ellā yāṇṭu
n toḻuteḻa viḷaṅkumThe following lines evidently meant for insertion here (i•e•, after viḷaṅkum) had been incised below the record:— 1 yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai••• 2 kesa ripanma r śrīrājarājade••• 3 3Āvatu uttoṅka••• 4 tu brahmade yam ciṟupaḻuvūr••• 5 vaṭakarai rejendrasiṁha pa••• 6 ttacatuṟppetimaṅkala••• 7 pamanṟāṭi ūrāna ce • van•••kopparakecaripanma ṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu
kunṟakkūṟṟattuc ciṟupaḻuvūrt tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyār tevatāṉa
māṉa veṭṭakakuṭi panmā heśva rappererikkiḻ nilam Ivverikkut
teṟkkum Ūrukkuk kiḻakkum Uḷppaṭṭa nilattil pattuceyyum tiripu
vaṉacun=ta ratevarkku Irupotaikkut tiruvamutukku vaccatu Irunāḻi
Ariciyāl Oru tiruvamutum kāṭṭa vaccatu panmā heśvara rakṣai ḷa
Digital edition of SII 5.664 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
